name: Montgomery Area Transit System (MATS)
description: Public bus system operating 11 fixed routes across Montgomery. Serves major shopping areas, medical facilities, government buildings, and educational institutions. $1.25 base fare.

name: Montgomery Regional Airport (MGM)
description: Commercial airport serving the River Region with flights to major hubs including Atlanta, Dallas, Charlotte, and Chicago. Recently completed $48M terminal renovation.

name: Major Roadway Network
description: Montgomery is served by I-65 (north-south), I-85 (northeast to Atlanta), and US-231, US-80, US-82. The Northern Bypass (I-85/I-65 connector) reduces downtown congestion.

name: Bike & Pedestrian Infrastructure
description: Growing network of bike lanes, shared-use paths, and pedestrian improvements. The Riverwalk trail system, downtown bike lanes, and planned Greenway connections expand options.

name: Traffic Counts & Congestion
description: Highest traffic volumes on Eastern Blvd (45,000 AADT), Atlanta Hwy (38,000 AADT), and Vaughn Rd (32,000 AADT). Peak hours 7-9 AM and 4-6:30 PM.
